name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who hits it and when?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. For protocol-facing behavior, reference the Pusher
protocol semantics it should match.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Scope check

PulseWS intentionally excludes an admin dashboard, webhooks, database-backed
app management, encrypted channels, and clustering beyond Redis pub/sub — see
the [engineering spec](../../docs/pulsews-engineering-doc.md). Is this request
within scope?
